"The essence of genius as a modality is that it seems to reverse the logic of excellence."
[https://www.edge.org/response-detail/23879 Eric's 2013 Edge essay on Excellence]

{{#widget:YouTube|id=EzdLBGPidAM}}

== See Also ==

* [[Kung Fu Panda]]
* [[Skadoosh]]
* [[There is no secret ingredient]]
* [[The War on Excellence]]

{{Stub}}

[[Category:Ericisms]]
[[sn:Genius vs Excellence]][[Category:Education]][[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
